message:
fix: EnsureAllMetadata maps database names to rig names via routes.jsonl

EnsureAllMetadata was using database names (bd, gt, sw) as rig names,
creating stub directories at wrong paths like /gt/bd/.beads/ instead of
/gt/beads/mayor/rig/.beads/.

Adds buildDatabaseToRigMap() to resolve prefix -> rig name from
routes.jsonl before calling EnsureMetadata.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2600
Author: ChicK00o (Rohit Bhosle)

Co-authored-by: Rohit Bhosle <mail@rohitbhosle.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
